Investment Banking Summer Internship Programme 2027 Singapore

Barclays Investment Banking advises corporate clients on mergers and acquisitions (M&A), corporate finance and capital raising through equity origination and debt origination, including loans.

As a Summer Analyst you will support live deals and transaction execution: building valuation analyses, supporting due diligence, drafting offering memoranda, and preparing client pitch materials for corporates and financial sponsors alongside senior bankers.
